content.en:
After a long time.

Rumble!

Ye Tian's soul will completed the transformation and officially stepped into the eleventh dimension.

He tested it with the Thousand Dimensions Technique, and his soul will instantly entered the eleventh dimension.

"It's done, the soul will of the eleventh dimension!"

After Ye Tian's soul will was raised to the eleventh dimension, his strength also increased a lot, the power of the tenth dimension's will peerless learning increased, and even the power of the Five Realms Supreme Peerless Martial Arts increased slightly.

If he realized the eleventh dimension of will, it would be even more terrifying.

But this will be difficult, even an invincible existence in the fifth realm like the Heavenly Dimension Realm Lord has not realized the eleventh dimension will peerless, if he really realizes it, maybe he will not fall.

And the multi-dimensional tribulation of death is coming, and he has no time to realize the eleventh dimensional will.

In the days that followed, he continued to refine the Blood Devouring Dimensional Grass, but the effect was average, not as good as before, but it was still better than nothing.

So, he continued to collect the Blood Devouring Dimensional Grass and continued to refine the soul will, which was slowly rising.

At the same time, he was also looking for more treasures from the depths of the tenth dimensional void, so naturally he could not avoid killing with some extremely powerful fifth realm multidimensional lifeforms.

Relying on the 473 six-dimensional rules, he had no problem saving his life, but when he really encountered that kind of incomparably demonic fifth-realm multi-dimensional life, his multi-dimensional life replica body was undoubtedly not enough.

Moreover, he also discovered one thing, that is, the sixth realm of the tenth dimension appeared many times, and some of the sixth realm multi-dimensional beings lingered on the periphery of the tenth dimension many times.

This is still the number of times he has found it, and the number of times he has not found it is probably more.

Obviously, this represents a signal that the multidimensional catastrophe of death is coming, and these sixth realm multidimensional beings are also looking for opportunities.

During the Multidimensional Tribulation of Death, there will inevitably be an opportunity that all the multidimensional beings of the Sixth Realm desire, otherwise it will not attract the multidimensional life of the Sixth Realm.

Some Sixth Realm multidimensional beings may just snatch opportunities, but some Sixth Realm multidimensional beings will destroy everything, or destroy extradimensional realms in battle.

This is the real disaster!

Time flies, and there are only more than one million extradimensional epochs left before the arrival of the Death Multidimensional Tribulation.

At this time, the multi-dimensional tribulation has ended.

And just in the past multidimensional tribulation, many extra-dimensional territories have been destroyed miserably, and even many (cfei) extra-dimensional territories have been destroyed, which is all caused by the battle at the fifth realm level.

The multidimensional tribulation of death is getting closer and closer, and Ye Tian recalls all the human races that have been exposed.

If he doesn't come back, then he will have to give up.

All the strong people of the human race know about the multi-dimensional tribulation of death, if they don't come back at the critical moment, and they still delay time because of some trivial matters, they will die by themselves.

Fortunately, such a human race is extremely rare, perhaps trapped somewhere.

If he could be rescued, Ye Tian would also send a Terran powerhouse to save him.

Gradually, countless Terrans stayed in the territory of 5,333.

And the territory of No. 7362 that was still left and some of the Terrans scattered in other territories were also picked up by Ye Tian one by one.

After doing all this, Ye Tian quietly waited for the day when the Death Multidimensional Tribulation arrived.

Gradually, more than a million extradimensional epochs passed.

The multidimensional catastrophe of death is coming.

this day.

Ye Tian took out the Thirteen Tribulations of the Ten-Dimensional Heavenly Pass Pagoda in the territory of Five Thousand Three Hundred and Thirty-Three and placed it in the void.

Then.

Countless Terran extra-dimensional realms have entered the Ten-Dimensional Heavenly Pass Tower with one world after another, and countless Terran weak people are scattered in the void of the Ten Dimensional Heavenly Pass Tower under the protection of the extradimensional realm.

In order to ensure the safety of the human race, Ye Tian also transformed the heavens and the earth in the ten-dimensional Tianguan Tower, making it suitable for the survival of the human race.

After all, they would have lived in the Ten Dimensional Heavenly Gate Tower for an incomparably long time, so it was natural to transform the environment to suit the survival of the human race.

At the same time, all the resources and treasures of the human race and other items were brought into the Ten Dimensional Heavenly Gate Tower, and those who were really hard to take away could only choose to give up.

After some time, all the Terrans migrated to the Ten Dimensional Heavenly Gate Tower.

And Ye Tian's replica body sits in this territory, waiting for the arrival of the multidimensional catastrophe of death.

Then.

A Fifth Realm came over and said, "Ye Tian Realm Lord, please let my clan also enter the Ten Dimensional Heavenly Pass Tower, I am willing to hand over all my resources." "

"Get out!"

Ye Tian snorted coldly: "If you don't leave, just stay here!"

This Fifth Realm's pupils shrank, and without saying a word, he ran away.

He could see that it was the supreme mastery of the Five Realms, and no matter how much he had, he would be killed in seconds.

Where does he dare to stay!

Ye Tian looked at the fifth realm that had escaped, and sneered: "You still want me to sympathize with you and protect your clansmen, if this is a start, countless family forces will come over to Serbs, am I stupid?"

Another time passed.

this day.

The multidimensional catastrophe of death has officially arrived.

Wow!

Waves of death calamity were born, like extradimensional storms, sweeping through extradimensional territories.

Six Thousand Territory.

Countless living beings, including the extradimensional realm, have not yet realized the advent of the Death Multidimensional Tribulation, their side is too backward to know the horror of the Multidimensional Tribulation.

In an instant, wisps of death power emerged, sweeping through the extradimensional realms.

I saw that one by one, the extradimensional realms collapsed and dissipated, and countless living beings fell under the power of death.

One Venerable Second Realm sacrificed all the treasures, trying to resist the power of death.

Outcome.

In an instant, everything turned to dust.

One by one, those forces dissipated.

After a breath, the Six Thousand Realm, as well as the rest of the Realm, were all turned into the Realm of Death, and not a single living creature survived.

Similarly.

The same is true of the 5000 Territory, where a large number of extradimensional realms have fallen one by one, and they are simply unable to resist the death tribulation power of the Death Multidimensional Tribulation.

Some extradimensional realms hidden in various ruins were also not able to escape, and were annihilated along with the ruins.

Ye Tian looked at the super-dimensional territories that sank and annihilated one by one, and he didn't even look at it, this was a certain ending, there was no way to change it, if he was not strong enough, he would also fall into the multi-dimensional catastrophe of death.

He only wants to survive the multidimensional catastrophe of death now, and he doesn't want anything else.

Of course, he has a good chance of surviving, and he even has a multi-dimensional life copy body left in the tenth dimension, even if the killing in the tenth dimension is very powerful, it will not make him unable to keep a copy body.

If you want to really wipe him out, unless you perform the Supreme Skill of the Six Realms, you can follow his copy body and kill all of his copy bodies.

But the multi-dimensional tribulation of death will not lead to the comprehension of the existence of the supreme mastery of the Six Realms!
